description_long: This is a high-top sneaker in a vibrant pink color, featuring a white rubber toe cap and a white midsole with a black stripe running along its edge. The shoe has white laces threaded through metal eyelets, and the iconic Converse All Star circular logo patch is visible on the inner ankle area. The canvas upper shows some creasing and wear, particularly around the ankle collar and heel, indicating regular use. The outsole is made of textured rubber, designed for grip, and the heel area displays the 'Converse All Star' branding. The shoe's overall structure is soft and flexible, typical of canvas sneakers, with a slightly padded interior for comfort. The visible wear and fraying at the top edge suggest it has been worn frequently in urban environments.
description: A pink high-top Converse sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and visible All Star branding, showing signs of regular wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white rubber toe cap, laces, and the tongue of the pink high-top sneaker.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the Converse All Star logo patch, white laces, and the full canvas upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel with 'Converse All Star' branding and visible wear at the collar.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the plain pink canvas upper and the shoe's overall silhouette without the logo patch.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner ankle, black and white; 'Converse All Star' text on the heel in black.
